[Affordability Confirmation] To Steven Johnson,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

Borrower: Steven Johnson
IP: 174.244.83.97
DateTime (UTC): 06-03-2025
Stated Monthly Income: Full Time Employed $3900
Rent: $0
Bills: $0
Other Expenses: $650
Your Credit Commitments: $1100
Transform Credit Repayment: $167.730000
To be safe: $50
Total available after expenditure and this loan repayment: $1932.270000


Yours sincerely
Transform credit Applications Dept

interactions.body:
(Borrower GT Rule 1 Email) [RE:Affordability Confirmation] Hi Steven, 

Thanks for reaching out, we understand that it can seem difficult to find a cosigner at first. Don't worry though, we help people like you every day!

We're a cosigner lender, all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. A cosigner is a great sign that someone trusts you, and that we should too regardless of your credit history! If your cosigner trusts you, then we will.

A cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor or even a colleague) who is a US resident, has a 700+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time - someone who owns their home or pays a mortgage is much more likely to be accepted. Remember, as long as you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to make a payment! You might find some useful tips on how to approach finding or speaking to a potential cosigner here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans

When you have found someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/XVIGRZEK - we'd love for your loan to add to the $100 million we've already paid out to people just like you. If you still find that you're not able to find a cosigner, please respond to this email with CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else.

Thanks, 
Jade@Transform Credit

(Borrower Cancellation Email) [RE:Affordability Confirmation] Hi Steven. Just to confirm we have canceled your loan application. If you wish to reapply in the future, please visit: https://transformcredit.com/ James, Transform Credit

Calling allows us to give you instant updates avoiding long waits to speak to a person. We also have answers to our frequently asked questions online: https://transformcredit.com/Help/Contact. If you still have questions, you can reply to this sms explaining in detail and we'll get back to you asap. Jade, Transform Credit

Jade, Transform Credit

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi DIANE, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! interactions.body: (Borrower GT Default SMS) Hi Noe, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://togetherloans.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/2R3TV7TX - we'd love your loan to add to the +$100 million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Together Loans

interactions.body: Hi Sayra. Thank you for letting us know. We confirm that this loan application as a cosigner to Noe is canceled. Rest assured, your data is kept safe, used only in accordance with legal and regulatory guidelines, and never shared without your consent. Thanks, Together Loans

Hi Noe, to continue your application, you will need a new cosigner. Please, use this link to invite them: https://tcrdt.com/s/2R3TV7TX  We aim to pay out every loan within 24-48 hours of the cosigner being accepted. interactions.body:
(Appeals Auto Response GT Email) [RE:Don't contact me again] Hi , 

Thanks for contacting Appeals. 

We understand that it may be disheartening or concerning if you've been considered an unsuitable cosigner, don't worry though - the most important thing is that we can still help the borrower.

There are a few reasons we could find someone to be unsuitable - the most common being a less than perfect credit history. Being a cosigner is a big financial commitment, they are responsible for making any loan payments that their borrower does not. Reviewing all cosigners' Experian credit histories allows us to check that they would be able to manage any payments they are required to make, in addition to maintaining any other existing commitments. If a cosigner has had missed or late payments in the past, we can't be certain that being a cosigner s a good idea and wouldn't see them struggle to keep their other accounts up to date. Alternatively, If a cosigner's credit file is locked when they apply, we won't have been able to confirm either way (if this has happened with you, you can reapply as soon as your credit file is unlocked: https://tcrdt.com/s/K0WX9PLD). 

A cosigner must have a 750+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time (homeowners and mortgage payers are more likely to be accepted). It's important to remember that a cosigner can only be on one loan with Together Loans at a time too. If you'd like to review the information that we used in our assessment of your credit, you can check your Experian credit report/score for free at: https://www.experian.com/. 

In the meantime, the $0 will be reserved for the borrower. We'd love for their loan to add to the $100 million we've already paid out to people just like them. If you have any other questions, you may find the answer here: https://togetherloans.com/faq.

Jade@Together Loans

interactions.body:
Hi, we understand your frustration, but to clarify, this is now the third time your attempted settlement payment has bounced, most recently on 5/19. Each time, the issue lies with your bank declining or reversing the transaction, not with us denying it. Your upcoming payment is due tomorrow. To remain in good standing, please make your monthly payment in full, else we will collect from Roberto per their separate agreement. Best,
Transform Credit

We strongly recommend that you contact your bank directly to understand why these payments are not processing successfully. Until a payment fully clears, the loan remains open and at risk of default.

Let us know if you’d like to try another method—we’re happy to help facilitate this.

Best,
Transform Credit

(AI BW Payment Plan - Requesting arrangement - Non-DIA SMS) Hi Matthew, to set up a one-time payment promise, download our app https://tcrdt.com/s/N8MP0EPX If no promise is made, we will still attempt to collect $177.13 from you on 05/22/2025 as usual. Thanks, Mia, Transform Credit

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. interactions.body: (Borrower GT Default SMS) Hi Tracy, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 750+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/I42AB371 - we'd love your loan to add to the $25million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Transform Credit

interactions.body: (Want to speak to someone - PreVC BRW SMS) Hi james. If you need help, we have a 24/7 interactive call handler, +1 470 435 6300. This will give you live updates about your application! Calling allows us to give you instant updates avoiding long waits to speak to a person. We also have answers to our frequently asked questions online: https://https://togetherloans.com/Help/Contact. If you still have questions, you can reply to this sms explaining in detail and we'll get back to you asap. Jade, Together Loans

(AI CB RED - Reported payments Email) [RE: ] Hi james,

Thank you for reaching out.

When you applied for a loan with us, we offered two different products: Loans up to $10,000 with a co-signer, and CreditBuilder which is a small loan held on our customer's behalf that customers make monthly payments against, building up their credit score.

The CreditBuilder is offered to everyone that applies for a loan with us, and our customers will have the choice to sign up or not sign up for the CreditBuilder loan, as part of the application process. I can see that on 03/17/2026, when you applied for this loan of $7000, you also reached the page where the CreditBuilder product was explained and offered, and you chose to sign up when clicked on “ok, set up my account”.

After signing up, we immediately sent you a “Welcome to Together Loans CreditBuilder!” email, confirming your account, and further explaining the benefits of the product you had opted into. I can see this was sent to you at 01/01/0001 to dalton1641@gmail.com. The email also provided you with your login link, so you could access your account and manage/cancel it, at any time, even before the first payment.

When you signed up for CreditBuilder, you took the first step in building your score. Each month you pay $5, we report these payments to the Credit Bureaus as interest against the loan that has been held on your behalf. These successful payments build your credit history, helping to improve your score. The great thing about CreditBuilder is that if you decide to cancel/stop paying, CreditBuilder is simply marked as paid in full and so missed payments can never undo the positive impact that your on-time payments have been making on your credit score. Our customers use CreditBuilder as a fantastic stepping stone towards seeing the benefits of an improving credit score, without the responsibility of taking on a big financial commitment.

We also sent you a payment reminder before collecting your CreditBuilder payment, to your email, reminding you that your $5 payment was due. This again provided you with your login details, where you were able to manage or cancel your CreditBuilder, should you have decided you no longer wanted to benefit from the product.

We've been reporting the CreditBuilder loan to Experian, demonstrating any payments you have made. As these on-time payments accumulate, they contribute positively to your overall credit score, paving the way for better credit opportunities in the future.

Based on the above, we believe we acted inline with your instructions. However, we now understand that you may not have intentionally signed-up to CreditBuilder and, so as a gesture of goodwill, we have issued you a refund to put you back in the position you were in, prior to opening your CreditBuilder account.

We will also close your account which will be reported as paid in full and settled on your Credit File.

We understand that confusion can sometimes arise and we appreciate your patience as we work to rectify this situation. Please allow 3 business days for the refund to show in your account.

Many thanks,
Ben, Together Loans

Hi James, thanks for reaching out to us. It looks like Scott still needs to add their bank account before we can pay out your $7000 loan. We accept most banks but we don't accept online banks such as Chime and Cashapp, as we can't verify their identity through these companies. We also can’t accept joint accounts between borrowers and cosigners, savings or prepaid accounts. Scott’s account needs to be an open and valid checking account, in their name and capable of ACH payments. Please, continue your application here: https://tcrdt.com/s/GX0AX7RF or let us know if you need more help. Reply CANCEL to unsubscribe. Thanks, Together Loans

Thank you for starting your Transform Credit loan application. 

Below is a link where you can view/download our free Credit Education Program. You're not required to do anything with this in order to proceed with your application, but we recommend reviewing the content as you may find it helpful.

https://transformcredit.com/credit-education-program?state=fl

Transform Credit Inc.

[Affordability Confirmation] To Gina Joseph,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

Borrower: Gina Joseph
IP: 172.58.132.1
DateTime (UTC): 11-24-2025
Stated Monthly Income: Full Time Employed $8500
Rent: $0.00

Other Expenses: $2700.00
Your Credit Commitments: $1200.00

interactions.body: (AI BW Bank - Bank criteria SMS) Hi Mary, we accept most banks but not online banks such as Chime and Cashapp, as we can't verify the cosigner's identity through these companies. We also can't accept joint accounts between borrowers and cosigners, or prepaid accounts. Sybil must provide an account that is open, valid, in their name and capable of ACH payments. Ask Sybil to add a suitable bank here: https://tcrdt.com/s/RGTPDZJP Reply CANCEL to unsubscribe. Thanks, Transform Credit

(Borrower GT Default SMS) Hi Mary, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 750+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/4OJLB4UW - we'd love your loan to add to the +$100 million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Transform Credit

interactions.body:
(Borrower GT Default Email) [RE:Need help finding a cosigner?] Hi Jennifer, 

Here at Transform Credit, we only offer cosigner loans. Providing a cosigner means we're able to lend to you, even if your credit score is below 500. If your cosigner trusts you then we will too. Your cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor, colleague or even your in-laws!) who:

- Is a US resident
- Is over 23 
- Has a credit score of more than 700
- Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.
- Trusts you and will pay if you do not 
- Will give correct contact details and sign the agreement

More information about our cosigner requirements can be found here: https://transformcredit.com/faq. Send this link to your cosigner so they can register online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/F0JLGJF8

If you are not able to find a cosigner, please let me know by responding to this email with "CANCEL". You can reapply at any time by visiting: https://transformcredit.com

Thanks,
Transform Credit

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Default SMS) Hi Phillip, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 750+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/YSE82EBH - we'd love your loan to add to the +$100 million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Transform Credit

[Affordability Confirmation] To CAROLYN MILLER,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to charges of criminal fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

[Affordability Confirmation] To Porfilio Silva,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

Borrower: Porfilio Silva
IP: 67.198.73.177
DateTime (UTC): 06-20-2025
Stated Monthly Income: Retired $9700
Rent: $0
Bills: $300
Other Expenses: $500
Your Credit Commitments: $0
Transform Credit Repayment: $237.620000
To be safe: $50

Yours sincerely
Transform credit Applications Dept

[Your Transform Credit Loan Application Ref: 0634231713060027052000] Hello Kelly,

Thank you for starting your Transform Credit loan application. 

Below is a link where you can view/download our free Credit Education Program. You're not required to do anything with this in order to proceed with your application, but we recommend reviewing the content as you may find it helpful.

https://transformcredit.com/credit-education-program?state=ca

Transform Credit Inc.

[Affordability Confirmation] To Kelly Gomez,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. interactions.body:
(Borrower GT Rule 1 Email) [RE:You asked us to help with $3000 - and we can!] Hi Rudolph, 

Thanks for reaching out, we understand that it can seem difficult to find a cosigner at first. Don't worry though, we help people like you every day!

We're a cosigner lender, all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. A cosigner is a great sign that someone trusts you, and that we should too regardless of your credit history! If your cosigner trusts you, then we will.

A cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor or even a colleague) who is a US resident, has a 750+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time - someone who owns their home or pays a mortgage is much more likely to be accepted. Remember, as long as you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to make a payment! You might find some useful tips on how to approach finding or speaking to a potential cosigner here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans

When you have found someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/WWEFFSQL - we'd love for your loan to add to the $25million we've already paid out to people just like you. If you still find that you're not able to find a cosigner, please respond to this email with CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else.

Thanks, 
Jade@Transform Credit

Hi Theodore,
While checking, I could confirm that, unfortunately, your previous cosigner has failed our final checks and therefore is not suitable for your loan. Due to data protection, I can't share any specific reason, we have sent them an email explaining the reason behind this decision
We can still pay out your $3000 once you find a suitable cosigner. Remember, a suitable cosigner is someone who has a credit score of more than 750 and a good history of paying their bills on time. Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time. Most of our borrowers ask a close friend or family member to be their cosigner. Just use give your new cosigner this link to apply online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/ZCO6GBBV.
Thanks, Transform Credit

(GT - Email - settling loan) [RE:There is a Pending ACH on your Account - 120388CAPS] Hi Kenneth,
 
Your current balance is $4782.04.  
 
To pay off your loan, please follow: https://tcrdt.com/s/CP56WCMY

We will need to receive the funds within 5 working days to honor this figure. After 5 working days, the balance you need to pay will update to include the additional daily accrued interest. This payoff figure also excludes any other changes to the balance that may occur, aside from accrued interest, such as a returned payment.
 
Thanks,
TransformCredit

(AI GT Confirming Payment - Pending payment - GT DD - Arrears Email) [RE: There is a Pending ACH on your Account - 120388CAPS] Hi Kenneth,

There is a pending payment of $195.80, from your bank account. ACH payments can take up to 5 days to clear, at which point the payment will show on your account.

Will this payment be successful? This loan is currently 16 days past due, so if this payment isn't successful it's crucial the account is brought current immediately, to prevent extra interest accruing and avoid further escalation.

You can make a payment immediately here: https://tcrdt.com/s/DU3PCHBU or pay late here: https://tcrdt.com/s/NCWG5TDY

Thanks,
Mia, Transform Credit

(GT - Email - balance and statement of account) [RE:There is a Pending ACH on your Account - 120388CAPS] Hi Kenneth,
 
Your balance as of today is $4782.04. Please bear in mind that we charge our interest daily against the balance, therefore this amount will change on a daily basis.
 
You can access your statement of account any time via this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/906QEZBS
 
If you are looking to settle your loan, please reply  with "settle my loan"
 
Thanks,
TransformCredit

[victoriahall] spk_0: Please leave your message for
spk_1: 619-88.

[Your TransformCredit Loan : 120388CAPS] Hi Kenneth,

To settle your loan, download our App https://tcrdt.com/s/N8MP0EPX or go online: https://tcrdt.com/s/CP56WCMY If the pending payment is going to clear, you can deduct that amount.

Funds must be received within five working days to honour the settlement amount and waive off any interest accumulated during this time frame. Otherwise, you will be charged for the account's interest accumulated during the time frame. 

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out. We're here to assist you.

Thanks,
Transform Credit

[Affordability Confirmation] To DEIJAH WILLIAMS,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. (Borrower GT Default Email) [RE:Affordability Confirmation] Hi Rachel, 

Here at Transform Credit, we only offer cosigner loans. Providing a cosigner means we're able to lend to you, even if your credit score is below 500. If your cosigner trusts you then we will too. Your cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor, colleague or even your in-laws!) who:

- Is a US resident
- Is over 23 
- Has a credit score of more than 700
- Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.
- Trusts you and will pay if you do not 
- Will give correct contact details and sign the agreement

More information about our cosigner requirements can be found here: https://transformcredit.com/faq. Send this link to your cosigner so they can register online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/YPN45YFG

If you are not able to find a cosigner, please let me know by responding to this email with "CANCEL". You can reapply at any time by visiting: https://transformcredit.com

Thanks,
Transform Credit

[Your Transform Credit Loan Application Ref: 0613310414070219100132] Hello Julio,

Thank you for starting your Transform Credit loan application. 

Below is a link where you can view/download our free Credit Education Program. You're not required to do anything with this in order to proceed with your application, but we recommend reviewing the content as you may find it helpful.

https://transformcredit.com/credit-education-program?state=ca

Transform Credit Inc.

[Affordability Confirmation] To Julio Gonzalez,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

Borrower: Julio Gonzalez
IP: 107.199.64.25
DateTime (UTC): 05-06-2025
Stated Monthly Income: Self Employed $2500
Rent: $900
Bills: $300
Other Expenses: $300
Your Credit Commitments: $200
Transform Credit Repayment: $177.130000

Yours sincerely
Transform credit Applications Dept

[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : 0613310414070219100132] Hi Julio,

Thank you for contacting Transform Credit, your message is really important to us.

I can see that your application is active and you still have some tasks to finish before the loan is paid. Your current application contemplates a loan of $3000, over 24 months, paying back $177.13 monthly, but you can change these terms anytime before the loan is paid.

Transform Credit is a cosigner-based lender.  This means all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them, regardless of the loan that you're applying for and your credit score. Normally, a cosigner is a friend or a family member who knows you (the borrower) and trusts that it is a good idea for you to borrow money. A suitable cosigner is someone who has a credit score of more than 750 and a strong history of paying their bills on time. Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.

How does the application journey work? When you apply online, we will send you a unique link for your cosigner to register. As soon as we have everything we need from both of you, we’ll transfer the money. The money is transferred into your cosigner's account. This is to protect them, and us, against identity fraud, as transferring the money into their account ensures that they are fully aware of the loan.

You can check here more information about the application journey and common questions: https://transformcredit.com/faq 

To complete your application journey and check what is the next step, you can use this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/8PEFZ9EF

Any other questions, please let me know.

Have a nice day,
Divya@TransformCredit
